channel.title: Goatreview.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Goatreview.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: duty-free.cc
item.description: forum.duty-free.cc is a Russian-language forum focused on information security and hacking-related topics, where users discuss penetration testing, vulnerabilities, exploits, OSINT, and real-world cases. The platform presents itself as a community of cybersecurity professionals and enthusiasts who share experience, publish articles, and discuss methods of defense and attack; however, Link to article: https://goatreview.com/duty-free-cc/
